resources.string: Your daily dashboard \u2014 tasks, habits, and productivity at a glance
Track your habit streaks with tappable completion checkmarks
Instantly create tasks with natural language from your home screen
Your daily productivity score with trend tracking
3-day task preview \u2014 today, tomorrow, and the day after
Live Pomodoro timer with play, pause, and skip controls
Today\'s schedule \u2014 tasks and calendar events merged in one view
Follow one project\'s progress \u2014 milestones, streak, and upcoming work
